segments.name: Opening subway scenario
segments.goal: Set up the 8 AM subway listening context and yesterday's AI startup memory.
segments.listener_value: The listener immediately understands why this episode is personally relevant.

segments.name: Memory versus recommendation
segments.goal: Explain the difference between behavioral recommendation and long-term memory.
segments.listener_value: The listener can describe why 'knowing me' is more than topic labels.

segments.name: Boundary and closing takeaway
segments.goal: Ask whether too much memory feels uncomfortable, then close with a controllable-memory principle.
segments.listener_value: The listener leaves with a memorable line about knowing where to continue.
